name: Brian Schilder, PhD
bio: Postdoctoral fellow in the Koo Lab developing AI systems for personalized genomic interpretation. Expert in computational genomics and deep learning.

name: Peter Koo, PhD
bio: Associate Professor and PI studying deep learning approaches for genomics and regulatory biology at the Simons Center for Quantitative Biology.
